name: Ari Shaffir
bio: Ari Shaffir is an American stand-up comedian, podcaster, and writer known for confrontational, taboo-pushing material and long-form storytelling. He created and hosted the storytelling series This Is Not Happening, which began as a live show and web series before moving to Comedy Central. He hosted the Skeptic Tank podcast for over a decade and has released specials including Paid Regular and Double Negative.

timeline.ev: Creates the live storytelling show This Is Not Happening
Begins hosting the Skeptic Tank podcast
This Is Not Happening premieres on Comedy Central
Releases the Netflix special Double Negative
Ends the Skeptic Tank podcast after thirteen years

accolades: Creator and original host of Comedy Centrals This Is Not Happening
Longtime host of the Skeptic Tank podcast
